Class TableReceivingSubscriberController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseDisplayController
Controllers.TableReceivingSubscriberController
public class TableReceivingSubscriberController extends BaseDisplayController
Controller for the Table Receiving UI for subscribers. Handles displaying today's reservations, selecting a reservation, entering confirmation codes, seating the customer, and handling forgotten codes.

  • Field Summary

    TextField for the subscriber to enter their confirmation code manually.

    TableView displaying today's reservations for the subscriber.

  • Field Details

    • reservationsTable

      private javafx.scene.control.TableView<Reservation> reservationsTable
      TableView displaying today's reservations for the subscriber.

    • timeColumn

      private javafx.scene.control.TableColumn<Reservation, String> timeColumn
      TableColumn displaying the reservation time.

    • codeColumn

      private javafx.scene.control.TableColumn<Reservation, Integer> codeColumn
      TableColumn displaying the reservation confirmation code.

    • confirmationCode

      private javafx.scene.control.TextField confirmationCode
      TextField for the subscriber to enter their confirmation code manually.

  • Constructor Details

    • TableReceivingSubscriberController

      public TableReceivingSubscriberController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up table columns, registers the controller, requests today's reservations, and sets click listener for selecting a reservation row.

    • onRowClick

      private void onRowClick(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent event)
      Handles clicks on a reservation row in the table. Populates the confirmation code field with the selected reservation's code.
      Parameters:
      event - the MouseEvent triggered by clicking a table row

    • onEnter

      private void onEnter()
      Handles entering a confirmation code to seat the customer. Validates input and sends a request to the server to seat the customer.

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the Subscriber main UI.

    • showReservations

      public void showReservations(List<Reservation> list)
      Displays today's confirmed reservations in the table. Filters reservations to only show those for today with a grace period and status CONFIRMED. This method is called by ClientHandler when reservation data arrives from the server.
      Specified by:
      showReservations in class BaseDisplayController
      Parameters:
      list - the list of reservations received from the server

    • onForgot

      private void onForgot()
      Handles the "forgot my code" action. Sends a request to the server to retrieve or reset the confirmation code for the subscriber.
